description: Illustrative tokenized bond pattern separating token record, legal instrument, investor eligibility, and lifecycle evidence.

authority.name: Example Bond Issuer
authority.delegationScope: Defines tokenized bond template and issuance controls for the example.

lifecycle.migrationNotes: Production use would require legal-instrument, paying-agent, custodian, and regulator-specific review.

rightsModel.legalClaim: Claim is defined by the off-chain bond instrument, not by the token record alone.
rightsModel.economicRights: Coupon and principal rights follow the instrument documentation.
rightsModel.redemptionRights: Redemption follows maturity, call, default, or early redemption provisions.
